Again, I post for fun, need a link ask and I'll do my best
Joji
Limewire music video
Classic
Horrible
Cosmos synth
OGs remember WHERE THEY FROM
Have a day Previous collection https://imgur.com/gallery/44G9RV1
item.dc:creator: Arrow2duhknee

item.title: Lindsey Stirling
item.description: This is the first concert I got to use my professional camera at (2021). Lindsey’s management was nice enough to give me a photo pass in exchange for displaying picture I took at a previous concert that she liked. I always take pictures with my cell phone or a small point and shoot style camera at shows so it was fun to be able to use my big boy camera.
item.dc:creator: zozozo333

item.title: If "classroom safety pods" doesn't make you want to pull your kids from school idk what will
item.description:
I've got some questions. The first one is, which senator's spouse owns the most stock in the company that makes these. Fucking wake up, it's all a scam.
When is it going to be enough I know we're all very busy and tired, but I'm pretty sure there's going to have to be some sort of revolution to start fixing this.
item.dc:creator: ifyouwanttoknowmoreaboutparanoidpeoplejustfollowthemaround

item.title: American fascism
item.description: Please vote to get the fascists out of congress! Register to vote and/or check the status of your voter registration by going here: IWillVote.com Be sure to vote in every election, including the “small” ones. The “big” politicians often got their start by winning the small elections. You can help weed out the bad ones early. #vote
item.dc:creator: SisterMidnight

item.title: Guy tried to car jack my girl friend. She got away unharmed but the car got shot up during her escape with it.
item.dc:creator: CloudMage

item.title: Alice in Wonderland - Cosplay
item.description: My most recent cosplay - Alice from Alice in Wonderland! Also I have determined that wearing gloves like that is a nightmare when you also do your own photography... And before the comments yet again roll in this week: I do know what a tripod is, and I do use a remote for the camera :P This is my "Imgur Angle" aka the "After" part of my cosplay process - it's fun for me and allows me to do those time-lapses I post up :D I have like a million other pictures/angles on all my cosplay - and I may have something planned this October in regards to that here, so stay tuned I suppose? Oh! Also happy T.H.T.!
item.dc:creator: Alsoashley

item.title: When the gif is so goddamn adorable you favorite for future use.
item.dc:creator: deafkitten

item.title: Blanco Puckett
item.description:
Hi everyone, I'm MrPuckett
Nashville animal control put out a plea for help last week, being 200% over capacity
Nashville Humane was also over-capacity, WHAT IS HAPPENING
So I asked The Pucketts if they were okay to foster another dog, and after a brief conversation I headed down to Nashville Humane
Everyone - meet Blanco!!!! 8 months old and 40lbs he's just a big ole goofy puppy
We fell in love on the way home
First thing we did was get him out for adventures He's so fast and so eager to learn - just a mess on day one and by today he's so good on a leash
He and MrsPuckett formed a special bond pretty quick. She can be standoffish at times so this was amazing to see
Whenever I leave my place, I always come back to them cuddling
PJ wasn't so sure at first but he's coming around Blanco doesn't realize he's not a 5lb lapdog.
My living situation doesn't allow for a 4th dog, so Blanco will be with us until he gets adopted Hopefully getting all these pictures will help people see what a lovable adventure dog he really is
Are you near Nashville and looking for a new best friend? Blanco might be the dude for you!
But there is one thing I'll have to warn every potential adopter about --
He sneak attacks kisses all the time!
I'll be sad to see him go whenever he gets adopted, but the whole point of this is to find his forever home If he's been this special to us in only a week, he's going to make someone incredibly happy for many years to come
Look at that face he's such an angel
He taught me that having a 4th dog isn't so tough, and running with 3 dogs is a challenge I'm up for Maybe when I get in a bigger place I can add another permanent member to the family
He's also learning many things inside the home Like what the heck to do with bully sticks
He's just a big puppy who's never had a home but deserves one as much as anyone While the last week has definitely been a blast, the real treat will be seeing him find his forever home.
They just have to make sure to watch out for the kiss attacks. We love you MrBlanco, you deserve all the love in the world and you're going to get it. ... Think you might be a good forever home for Blanco? Check him out here - https://www.shelterluv.com/embed/animal/NHA-A-18405 ... Have a beautiful day everyone, see you at 1pm central Saturday for TheFreePizzaDude
item.dc:creator: MrPuckett

item.title: I Painted This Today!

This is some of the process for "Joyous Surge." I hope you enjoy watching! If you’re interested, My Etsy shop: www.etsy.com/shop/HaleyGrecoArtwork My YouTube channel: https://youtube.com/channel/UCkrQEkIvh1NBqHw9jB4Y0GA My Instagram: www.instagram.com/haley.greco.artwork

item.title: A happy dog meme dump to help with your mood
item.description:
Good boy Duke
great sportsmanship ensues
tadada dam dam...
I worked with a guy like that, sweet but kinda sad
Hey guys and gals, we're still trying to support the friend that saved me from suicide earlier this year in the effort of getting his little pup healthy and happy There's an update in the campaign about the progress and it's promissing so we may not be on it much longer. If you can help them out, please do! And have a great day https://gofund.me/96113348 ---------- I am leaving for the weekend to do a waitressing gig so I won't be around to answer comments or DM's. There will be no posts as well. See you guys on monday!
item.dc:creator: thedeadredhead
